name: AI Email Responder - Smartlead Reply Handler

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'unsubscribed', outreach_active: false, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.leadId, message_id: $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.messageId, reply_body: 'Done, you won\'t hear from us again. Apologies for the interruption.' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'rejected', outreach_active: false, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.leadId, message_id: $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.messageId, reply_body: 'Totally understand, appreciate you letting me know. If anything changes down the road, we\'ll be here. Best of luck!' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.leadId, message_id: $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.messageId, reply_body: 'Great to hear you\'re interested! Here\'s my calendar link so you can pick a time that works best: https://cal.com/forge-demo\n\nLooking forward to showing you what we\'ve built.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'Email Responder', severity: 'critical', businessId: $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.businessId, message: 'DEMO REQUEST from ' + $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.leadName + ' (' + $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.leadEmail + ') at ' + $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.companyName + '\n\nTheir reply: ' + $('Parse Reply Intent').first().json.replyText.substring(0, 500), requiresResponse: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $json.business_id, agent: 'email-responder', action: $json.action, details: JSON.stringify({ lead: $json.lead_email, intent: $json.intent_type, company: $json.company_name }), created_at: $json.created_at }) }}
